headline: Is Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CSCO a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Cisco Systems, Inc. on Compounding Your Wealth’s Substack by Sergey. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CSCO. Cisco Systems, Inc.’s share was trading at $87.71 as of April 20th. CSCO’s trailing and forward P/E were 31.55 and 18.98 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Bulldozer Maker Caterpillar Delivers Twice Nvidia's Returns — What's Behind The Move?
summary: Caterpillar's 185% return crushed Nvidia's 80%. Q1 power-gen sales surged 41%. The data center power thesis just went mainstream.

headline: Liftoff Welcomes Former J.D. Power CEO, Dave Habiger and Former Apple Controller, Betsy Rafael to its Board of Directors
summary: Liftoff, a global leader in performance marketing and monetization solutions for the mobile app economy, today announced the recent appointment of Dave Habiger and Elizabeth "Betsy" Rafael to its board of directors.

raw.headline: Liftoff Welcomes Former J.D. Power CEO, Dave Habiger and Former Apple Controller, Betsy Rafael to its Board of Directors

headline: Is Corning Stock A Buy At 50 Times Earnings?
summary: Corning (GLW) reported Q1 2026 core sales of $4.35 billion, representing an 18% year-over-year increase. The core insight hiding beneath this headline beat is how entirely the AI-driven acceleration is offsetting the more modest growth currently seen in the company's traditional Glass Innovations segment.

headline: A Look At Cisco (CSCO) Valuation After Strong Q2 Results And AI Infrastructure Momentum
summary: Cisco Systems (CSCO) shares have been in focus after the company reported strong Q2 FY2026 results, with revenue and adjusted EPS supported by demand for AI focused infrastructure and an increase in full year guidance. See our latest analysis for Cisco Systems. The strong Q2 update and recent product news around AI and quantum networking come after a 30 day share price return of 16.29% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 58.76%. This suggests momentum has been building both in the short...
